SVG: six numbered panels in a 2×3 grid showing the method: 1. Grow the yeast (yeast bottle); 2. Collect food waste from different houses in the neighbourhood (house with blue bin/bucket); 3. Dry the food waste in an oven and grind into a powder (open oven with food on racks); 4. Mix the yeast solution and food waste powder (two flasks on shelf with spoons); 5. Place in a beaker of warm water to allow fermentation to occur (two beakers with thermometers + clocks for elapsed time); 6. Measure the amount of ethanol present (two flasks with digital ethanol meters and probes).
